## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Shopify compatibility improvement
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run check:json` passes
- [ ] Relevant storefront pages were manually checked
- [ ] Theme Editor behavior was checked if settings or schemas changed

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, passwords, tokens, private store data, or generated ZIP files
- [ ] New visible text uses translation keys
- [ ] No parser-blocking scripts were added
- [ ] No unused settings, snippets, CSS, or debug code were added
